title: Microelectromechanical Systems
description: Explores microelectromechanical systems and their design, fabrication, testing, and practical engineering applications.

title: Mechanics of Materials
description: Studies how materials respond to loads, stress, strain, and deformation in engineering contexts.

title: Measurement and Instrumentation
description: Covers measurement and instrumentation methods for capturing and analyzing accurate engineering data.

title: Aircraft Dynamics
description: Introduces aircraft dynamics, including flight motion, stability, control, and overall aircraft behavior.

title: Aerospace Propulsion Systems
description: Studies aerospace propulsion systems and the principles behind producing thrust efficiently for flight.

title: NDT Technologies for Aircraft Structures and Materials
description: Covers nondestructive testing methods for evaluating aircraft structures and materials safely and reliably.

title: Reliability Engineering and Risk Analysis
description: Develops reliability engineering and risk analysis methods for assessing failure and uncertainty.

title: Aerodynamics
description: Examines aerodynamics, including airflow behavior, lift, drag, and performance of aircraft and vehicles.

title: Signals, Sensors and Communication Systems
description: Studies signals, sensors, and communication systems used in modern connected engineering applications.

title: The World of NANO: The Next Big Thing Is Really Small
description: Introduces nanoscience and nanotechnology, showing how very small structures create unusual properties and applications.

title: Mechanical Behaviour of Materials
description: Studies how materials deform, strengthen, and fail under repeated mechanical loading conditions.

title: Quantum Properties of Materials
description: Explores quantum behavior in materials and how it shapes their physical properties.

title: Ceramic Materials
description: Introduces ceramic materials, including their processing, properties, and practical engineering applications in modern settings.

title: Biomaterials
description: Examines biomaterials used in medical and biological applications for research and practice.

title: Materials Characterization
description: Covers techniques for characterizing materials and measuring their structure and properties precisely.

title: Thermodynamics of Materials
description: Studies thermodynamics as applied to materials behavior, stability, and phase changes in practice.

title: Design Laboratory
description: Provides hands-on design laboratory experience for applying materials and engineering concepts through projects.

title: Corrosion and Protection of Materials
description: Examines corrosion processes and protection methods for preserving material performance over time.

title: Nanostructures and Nanotechnology
description: Explores nanostructures and nanotechnology, focusing on fabrication, behavior, and practical materials applications.
